description_long: This object depicts a stylized figure seated in a wheelchair, characterized by large, round ears reminiscent of a cartoon character. The figure's body is simplified, with exaggerated limbs and a prominent head, and is positioned with one arm extended forward, gripping the wheel. The wheelchair features a visible frame, large rear wheels, and smaller front casters, with the figure's legs bent at the knees and feet resting on footrests. The entire object appears to be constructed from a hard, glossy material, giving it a sleek and reflective surface. The silhouette is bold and easily recognizable, with the wheelchair's structural elements and the figure's posture clearly defined. The color scheme is predominantly black, contributing to a striking and modern appearance.
description: A stylized, cartoon-like figure with large round ears sits in a glossy black wheelchair, gripping the wheel with one hand. The wheelchair has a visible frame, large rear wheels, and footrests, all rendered in a sleek, reflective finish.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, with its head, large ears, and one arm extended forward to grip the wheel; the wheelchair frame and wheels are clearly visible.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the figure's bent legs on the footrests and the extended arm, with the wheelchair's frame and wheel arrangement in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the figure's head and the large rear wheels of the wheelchair, with the frame and arm positions visible.
description_view_3: An angled view from behind and above reveals the figure's posture, the wheelchair's frame, and the arrangement of the wheels and footrests.
attribute_wheel_configuration: two large rear wheels and two small front casters
attribute_seating_posture: Upright with one arm extended forward gripping the wheel and legs bent at the knees resting on footrests.
